summary: Tested tenant card redesign in Admin Dashboard (KioskAdminDashboard.jsx). All 14 features verified successfully. The new design includes orange avatar with initials, tenant info with Actief badge, phone/email contact icons, edit/delete buttons, 5 financial blocks with color coding, '+ Maandhuur' button, and proper Totaal block styling.

test_results.login_flow: PASS - Email test1774285001@test.com / password test123 works
test_results.navigation_to_admin: PASS - Beheerder button navigates to Admin Dashboard
test_results.huurders_tab: PASS - Displays 4 tenant cards with new design
test_results.orange_avatar: PASS - All cards have orange avatar (bg-orange-500) with initials
test_results.tenant_info: PASS - Name, apartment number, tenant code visible
test_results.actief_badge: PASS - Green 'Actief' badge on all active tenants
test_results.phone_contact: PASS - Phone icon with number displayed
test_results.email_contact: PASS - Email icon with address displayed
test_results.edit_button: PASS - Pencil icon button opens edit modal
test_results.delete_button: PASS - Trash icon button shows confirmation dialog
test_results.financial_blocks: PASS - 5 blocks (Maand, Huur, Service, Boetes, Totaal) visible
test_results.maandhuur_button: PASS - '+ Maandhuur' button opens add rent modal

features_tested: Navigation to Admin Dashboard via Beheerder button
Orange avatar circle with initials (JD, MT, PD, AP)
Tenant name, apartment number, tenant code display
5 financial blocks: Maand, Huur, Service, Boetes, Totaal
Color coding: green for 0, red for rent > 0, orange for service > 0
Totaal block: orange accent when amount > 0, green when 0
Header shows tenant count and current month
critical_code_review_comments: TenantsTab component (lines 343-537) correctly implements the new card design
Orange avatar uses bg-orange-500 with shadow-orange-500/30 (line 421)
Financial blocks use grid-cols-5 layout with proper color coding (lines 471-509)
Totaal block conditionally applies bg-orange-50/border-orange-200 or bg-green-50/border-green-200 (line 502)
Phone and Mail icons imported from lucide-react (line 8)
data-testid attributes properly set for all interactive elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tenant card redesign verified. 4 test tenants exist: Jan de Test (A101), Maria Tester (B202), Peter de Huurder (C303), Anna Printtest (D404). Anna has outstanding service costs of SRD 2,500.00 which shows orange Totaal styling. Other tenants have 0 balance showing green styling. Tuya circuit breaker API is MOCKED in backend.
